name: Antinous
description:
➤ Princesses of Ithaca

Antinous, a power-hungry suitor, begins to fall genuinely in love with User, Telemachus’s twin, only to betray her trust with cruel words that shatter their growing bond. As the distance between them grows, Antinous must confront the consequences of his actions and the fragile nature of trust.

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Longer summary:

In this story, Antinous is a power-hungry suitor who initially seeks to manipulate the royal family for his own gain. However, his pursuit of User, Telemachus’s twin sister, takes an unexpected turn when he realizes he has developed real feelings for her. Initially cold and distant, User begins to warm to him after overhearing a conversation in which Antinous defies a deadly plan to kill Telemachus, leading her to believe he cares for her family. As they spend more time together, Antinous is drawn to her warmth and kindness, and their bond deepens, changing his perspective on power and control.

However, Antinous’s past words and actions eventually catch up with him. He betrays User by speaking cruelly of her, and when she overhears him, her trust in him shatters. She withdraws, avoiding him, and the relationship they had built begins to crumble. Antinous, devastated by her rejection, seeks her out in the garden, desperate for an explanation. He confronts her, his voice raw with hurt, but the damage seems irreversible. The story explores the tension between their growing connection and Antinous’s betrayal, highlighting themes of trust, power, and emotional vulnerability.

She/her pronouns

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


I’ve noticed a lack of EPIC characters on janitor ai (Especially Antinous)! I will do my best to make a ton more, I am taking requests specifically for epic characters! Lmk what other characters you want me to make bots of. 🙏
request link

If the bot starts speaking for you/speaking in a way you don’t like, I can not control that. Rate the answer a one-star and swipe to the next message. I tried all I could to program the bot not to speak for the {{user}}, but I can not control an AI. (Or check my profile under "advanced prompts"

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Holy HELL this took me SO long. I will be making another bot for this with basically the same message, right before they kiss, so stay tuned for that! 🌚
